status: INCOMPLETE — system config and compatibility captured; retrieval/generation/latency metrics require a representative corpus and running eval harness (RAGAS/DeepEval). Populate these after ingesting a project-specific dataset.

compatibility.notes: Existing persisted collections use hkunlp/instructor-large embeddings. Switching embedding model requires full reindex from source files.

metrics.status: NOT YET CAPTURED — requires: (1) a representative corpus ingested into Chroma, (2) 20-50 labeled Q/A/context triples in baseline_dataset.json, (3) running RAGAS eval harness. All values below are placeholders.
